name: econometrica-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to Econometrica, the journal of the Econometric Society and the field's flagship for economic theory, game theory, decision theory, and econometric methods. Covers theorem-driven topic selection, methods-literature positioning, identification and asymptotic theory (or axioms and existence/uniqueness), proof-strategy and generality, Monte Carlo and finite-sample evidence, simulation exhibits, terse formal house style, replication under the Data and Code Availability Policy, referee and co-editor strategy, Editorial Express submission, and multi-round rebuttals.
